description_long: This is a modern sailing yacht with a sleek white hull accented by a blue stripe along the waterline and a blue keel. The yacht features a single tall mast with a large triangular mainsail and two horizontal blue stripes, as well as a spacious deck area with visible railings and a cockpit at the stern. The deck includes a reddish-brown section, likely representing a seating or lounging area, and several hatches and fixtures for ventilation and access. The bow is sharply pointed, enhancing its hydrodynamic profile, while the stern is broad and equipped with a ladder for water access. The yacht's overall design suggests it is built for both comfort and performance, with ample space for passengers on deck. No registration numbers or identifying marks are visible on the hull.
description: A sleek white and blue sailing yacht with a tall mast, spacious deck, and a cockpit at the stern. The hull is streamlined, and the deck features railings, hatches, and a reddish-brown seating area.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the yacht, the tall mast, large sail, blue hull, and detailed deck layout with cockpit and railings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed bow, narrow profile, and central mast alignment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the cockpit, deck features, and blue hull.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the broad stern, cockpit area, ladder, and the full width of the deck and railings.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a deep-V profile, sharply pointed bow, and a blue stripe along the waterline. The hull is smooth and streamlined, with a visible keel beneath the waterline and no visible chines or additional hull markings.
attribute_deck_layout: Single-level deck with a spacious cockpit at the stern, surrounded by metal railings. The deck features a reddish-brown seating or lounging area, multiple hatches, and a central mast. There is a ladder at the stern for water access and walkways along both sides.
attribute_cabin_structure: One main cabin structure located amidships, with a low-profile, rectangular shape and several hatches on top. No windows or doors are visible from the exterior views, and the cabin blends smoothly into the deck.
